title: Extract insights from visual data on Azure
summary: Use generative AI vision and Content Understanding in Azure to extract insights from visual data.

sections.title: Extract insights from visual data on Azure
sections.summary: Use generative AI vision and Content Understanding in Azure to extract insights from visual data.

lessons.title: Develop a vision-enabled generative AI application
lessons.content_md:
A picture says a thousand words, and multimodal generative AI models can interpret images to respond to visual prompts. Learn how to build vision-enabled chat apps.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/develop-generative-ai-vision-apps/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Develop a vision-enabled generative AI application

lessons.title: Generate images with AI
lessons.content_md:
Use models in Microsoft Foundry to generate images

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/generate-images-azure-openai/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Generate videos with Microsoft Foundry
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to generate videos from text prompts with Sora 2 in Microsoft Foundry.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/generate-video-with-foundry/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Analyze images with Content Understanding
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to analyze images with Azure Content Understanding.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/analyze-images-with-content-understanding/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Create a multimodal analysis solution with Azure Content Understanding
lessons.content_md:
Use Azure Content Understanding for multimodal content analysis and information extraction.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/analyze-content-ai/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Create a multimodal analysis solution with Azure Content Understanding

lessons.title: Create an Azure Content Understanding client application
lessons.content_md:
Use the Azure Content Understanding API for multimodal content analysis and information extraction.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/analyze-content-ai-api/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Create an Azure Content Understanding client application

lessons.title: Extract data with Azure Document Intelligence
lessons.content_md:
Azure Document Intelligence uses OCR and deep learning to extract text, key-value pairs, tables, and structured data from documents. Learn how to use prebuilt models, train custom models, and build document processing solutions.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/extract-data-with-document-intelligence/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Extract data with Azure Document Intelligence

lessons.title: Create a knowledge mining solution with Azure AI Search
lessons.content_md:
Unlock the hidden insights in your data with Azure AI Search.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/ai-knowldge-mining/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Create a knowledge mining solution with Azure AI Search

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Extract insights from visual data on Azure
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Extract insights from visual data on Azure**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
